items.title: Armed men kidnap high-ranking security official in Haiti
items.dek: James Boyard's abduction is the highest-ranking abduction in the violence-wracked country in recent years, according to reports.

items.title: 'The greatest day of my life' - Knicks fans celebrate in San Antonio
items.dek: New York's basketball team won the NBA championship for the first time in over 50 years after beating the Spurs in Texas.
items.body: New York's basketball team won the NBA championship for the first time in over 50 years after beating the Spurs in Texas.
